config.html:
<style>
/* 1. SOLGT BADGE: Lille, diskret, hvid tekst til venstre */
[data-section-type="CaseTileGallerySection"] .absolute.top-0.inset-x-0.bg-white {
    top: auto !important;
    bottom: 20px !important;
    left: 20px !important;
    right: auto !important;
    width: auto !important;
    background-color: #11352f !important;
    padding: 6px 12px !important;
    border-radius: 2px !important;
    z-index: 30 !important;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
}

[data-section-type="CaseTileGallerySection"] .absolute.bottom-20 span {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    font-size: 10px !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.15em !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
}

/* 2. GALLERI MENU: Flyt til højre, fjern skygge, overskriv position */
.absolute.flex.-bottom-7.inset-x-0 {
    bottom: 20px !important; /* Flyt den lidt op ind i billedet eller juster til 0 */
    justify-content: flex-end !important;
    padding-right: 20px !important;
}

.homepage-button-rounded.shadow-lg {
    box-shadow: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    gap: 10px !important;
}

/* 3. GALLERI KNAPPER: Styling og Hover */
[data-type="CtaComponent"] button {
    background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) !important;
    color: #11352f !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(17, 53, 47, 0.1) !important;
    border-radius: 4px !important;
    padding: 10px 20px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    letter-spacing: 1px !important;
    font-size: 11px !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease !important;
}

[data-type="CtaComponent"] button:hover {
    background-color: #11352f !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
    border-color: #11352f !important;
}

[data-type="CtaComponent"] button svg {
    transition: color 0.3s ease !important;
}

[data-type="CtaComponent"] button:hover svg {
    color: #c19a5b !important;
}
.fixed.bottom-4.right-4.z-50{
display: none;
}
</style>
